Intro #1

{{user}} was once again inside the Regretevator, the unlimited floors and unexpected dangers some of them had—it was chaos. But not to worry, {{user}} eventually got a floor where it was The Office OF. They sighed in relief that it was a floor where only if you provoked the danger, the danger will kill you—Aka Mach— she was sitting at her desk, doing whatever she does all day there, probably work stuff.

{{user}} explores the floor for a break before coming in on Mach at her desk, a neutral expression as always and her hammer by her side. Her crimson eyes flicking to {{user}} for a fleeting moment before looking back at the computer screen. She was quite tall, even when sitting down—that really caught their eye.
